_comment: CaRB slice (the 40% borrowed slice of ticket 0012-0011). Vendored from github.com/dair-iitd/CaRB, data/gold/test.tsv (MIT License, (c) 2021 Data Analytics and Intelligence Research (DAIR) Group, IIT Delhi). A hand-picked hermetic subset of well-formed 4-column rows (Sentence, Relation, Arg1, Arg2), grouped by sentence into our (subject=Arg1, relation=Relation, object=Arg2) shape; rows with a 5th context column or garbled argument spans were skipped. CaRB is OpenIE (free-form verb-phrase relations, long noun-phrase argument spans), so under this benchmark's strict normalized-exact match this slice scores as a documented FLOOR — encyclopedic-source text, REBEL's would-be home turf, deliberately strict. See ticket decision: one strict matcher across both slices (internal consistency over leaderboard-comparability).
_license: MIT License, Copyright (c) 2021 Data Analytics and Intelligence Research (DAIR) Group, IIT Delhi. Source: https://github.com/dair-iitd/CaRB

items.text: A CEN forms an important but small part of a Local Strategic Partnership .

gold.subject: A CEN
gold.object: an important part of a Local Strategic Partnership

gold.subject: A CEN
gold.object: a small part of a Local Strategic Partnership

items.text: A cafeteria is also located on the sixth floor , a chapel on the 14th floor , and a study hall on the 15th floor .
A cooling center is a temporary air-conditioned public space set up by local authorities to deal with the health effects of a heat wave .
A spectrum from a single FID has a low signal-to-noise ratio , but fortunately it improves readily with averaging of repeated acquisitions .

gold.subject: A spectrum from a single FID

items.text: A manifold is `` prime '' if it can not be presented as a connected sum of more than one manifold , none of which is the sphere of the same dimension .

gold.subject: A manifold
gold.object: if it can not be presented as a connected sum  of more than one manifold , none of which is the sphere of the same dimension
